visa_types.name: Family Member of EU C visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Please click here for the documents (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/41pfE1XcXhWCzkvdCKWVWb/912bf0c1c63d3378b6b7f32f2b311b10/Family-memeber-EU-EEA-New-Delhi-Checklist__1_.pdf)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. 
Your passport must not be older than 10 years also it must be valid for at least THREE MONTHS longer than the intended stay. Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix the visa. 
- The Visa application form must be complete & duly signed by the applicant. (Both the parents must sign in case of minor applicants).
- Please ensure that you have photocopies of all your documents in equal number as the number of applications. For e.g. For 4 applicants there should be 4 copies of the sponsorship
                                                                            letter & other docs.
- Please keep two photocopies of the passport ready before you reach the counter.
- Please keep the exact amount of change for the visa fee & VFS logistic fee ready with you.
- Please mention the name of the applicant & the passport number behind the draft (1 draft per applicant).
- Please fill out the courier address & SMS request slip in order to avail of the mentioned services.
- A COPY of the all the documents should be attached in EACH application.
- Adhaar card (along with a photocopy)
Note: If you are visiting more than one Schengen country, the transfer & accommodation details for all the countries should be mentioned & highlighted in the
                                                                        itinerary.
                                                                    
Please highlight the specifics appended below in addition to Name of applicant & Passport Number on all the mentioned documents. 
- Itinerary: Date of Departure & Arrival & Check in & Check-out dates at the hotel
- Insurance: Date of birth /Duration of cover/Amount of coverage

visa_types.processing_time:
APPLY UPTO 6 MONTHS IN ADVANCE!
Visa applications 6 months before the planned travel day.
Since we are experiencing a huge increase in applications we strongly recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure to enable us to process your application in time for
                                                                        your departure date.
QUERIES? 
Visa related queries must be addressed to VFS Global Services Pvt. Ltd. Queries submitted to the High Commission will not be answered. (Contact details for VFS available below.)
If VFS do not have the answer VFS will forward your query to the Embassy on a priority basis. 
PROCESSING TIME
You can follow the status of your application via the VFS ‘tracking option’. 
The High Commission is experiencing a huge increase in applications, and while we assure you of our best to process your visa application on time for your travel, the processing time
                                                                        may take 3 weeks. Furthermore, please note that the days are counted from the day the application reaches the High Commission, and not from the date it is submitted to VFS. Kindly
                                                                        allow an additional 3-6 days of transmission between VFS/High Commission and return to VFS. Kindly ensure that: (i) your application is complete, (ii) any amendments/correction must
                                                                        be counter-signed by applicant; (iii) missing supporting documents will obviously result in delays and extending the processing time.
If you have questions and cannot find the information on our website, you can contact VFS Global https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt).
VFS Helpline Details
E-mail ID:  infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com)
Your correspondence should include:
- Your Full Name
- Date of Birth
- Passport Number
- Telephone Number
Apply well in advance and ensure your application is complete.

Overview
This category allows family member of EU nationals to apply for their Schengen visa from Nepal.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category allows family member of EU nationals to apply for their Schengen visa from Nepal.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Business / Conference]
The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.

The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Demand Draft in Indian Rupees (INR). Demand Draft should be drawn in favor of "High Commission of the Republic of Malta", and be payable at New Delhi. It is subject to change every month end. Kindly also note that the Demand Draft to pay visa fee must be made at the NIBL (Nepal Investment Bank Ltd) bank counter located inside Visa Application Center.
There is a bank charge of NPR 1375 to prepare the Demand draft.
Applicant shall be levied a Service charge (inclusive of VAT) of NPR 8894/- (50 Euros)
The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.

## Documents Required
Please click here for the documents (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/41pfE1XcXhWCzkvdCKWVWb/912bf0c1c63d3378b6b7f32f2b311b10/Family-memeber-EU-EEA-New-Delhi-Checklist__1_.pdf)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. 
Your passport must not be older than 10 years also it must be valid for at least THREE MONTHS longer than the intended stay. Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix the visa. 
- The Visa application form must be complete & duly signed by the applicant. (Both the parents must sign in case of minor applicants).
- Please ensure that you have photocopies of all your documents in equal number as the number of applications. For e.g. For 4 applicants there should be 4 copies of the sponsorship
                                                                            letter & other docs.
- Please keep two photocopies of the passport ready before you reach the counter.
- Please keep the exact amount of change for the visa fee & VFS logistic fee ready with you.
- Please mention the name of the applicant & the passport number behind the draft (1 draft per applicant).
- Please fill out the courier address & SMS request slip in order to avail of the mentioned services.
- A COPY of the all the documents should be attached in EACH application.
- Adhaar card (along with a photocopy)
Note: If you are visiting more than one Schengen country, the transfer & accommodation details for all the countries should be mentioned & highlighted in the
                                                                        itinerary.
                                                                    
Please highlight the specifics appended below in addition to Name of applicant & Passport Number on all the mentioned documents. 
- Itinerary: Date of Departure & Arrival & Check in & Check-out dates at the hotel
- Insurance: Date of birth /Duration of cover/Amount of coverage

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification
                                                                        while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further
                                                                        processing. Photo specification are given in the below link : 
Click here for the photo specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/UPo8B0SZYENmUVWXTJ6A4/946dbceef349c0a1ae870ec2315a3773/photo_160226.pdf) 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link (Harmonised-schengen-visa-application-form-eng.pdf)
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
APPLY UPTO 6 MONTHS IN ADVANCE!
Visa applications 6 months before the planned travel day.
Since we are experiencing a huge increase in applications we strongly recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure to enable us to process your application in time for
                                                                        your departure date.
QUERIES? 
Visa related queries must be addressed to VFS Global Services Pvt. Ltd. Queries submitted to the High Commission will not be answered. (Contact details for VFS available below.)
If VFS do not have the answer VFS will forward your query to the Embassy on a priority basis. 
PROCESSING TIME
You can follow the status of your application via the VFS ‘tracking option’. 
The High Commission is experiencing a huge increase in applications, and while we assure you of our best to process your visa application on time for your travel, the processing time
                                                                        may take 3 weeks. Furthermore, please note that the days are counted from the day the application reaches the High Commission, and not from the date it is submitted to VFS. Kindly
                                                                        allow an additional 3-6 days of transmission between VFS/High Commission and return to VFS. Kindly ensure that: (i) your application is complete, (ii) any amendments/correction must
                                                                        be counter-signed by applicant; (iii) missing supporting documents will obviously result in delays and extending the processing time.
If you have questions and cannot find the information on our website, you can contact VFS Global https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt).
VFS Helpline Details
E-mail ID:  infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com)
Your correspondence should include:
- Your Full Name
- Date of Birth
- Passport Number
- Telephone Number
Apply well in advance and ensure your application is complete.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen Visa
Schengen visa has to be obtained from the embassy or consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application.
                                                                        In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the embassy or the consulate where you will be staying for the maximum number of days, or from the
                                                                        point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows business people to make a short business visit to Schengen during your visa validity period. Business activities may include a conference up to 90 days within a 180 day
                                                                        period from date of first entry.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Business / Conference]
The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.

The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Demand Draft in Indian Rupees (INR). Demand Draft should be drawn in favor of "High Commission of the Republic of Malta", and be payable at New Delhi. It is subject to change every month end. Kindly also note that the Demand Draft to pay visa fee must be made at the NIBL (Nepal Investment Bank Ltd) bank counter located inside Visa Application Center.
There is a bank charge of NPR 1375 to prepare the Demand draft.
Applicant shall be levied a Service charge (inclusive of VAT) of NPR 8894/- (50 Euros)
The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.

## Documents Required
Business (New Delhi) Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6094Q7UyybAeGUTrgu23I2/6fd0676dd109e7e4f045dc0e0a5df161/Business-New_Delhi-Checklist.pdf)
Official Delegations Govt Officers (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/malta/nepal/english/pdf/Official-Delegations-Govt-Officers.pdf)
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. 
Your passport must not be older than 10 years also it must be valid for at least THREE MONTHS longer than the intended stay. Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix
                                                                        the visa. 
- The Visa application form must be complete & duly signed by the applicant. (Both the parents must sign in case of minor applicants).
- Please ensure that you have photocopies of all your documents in equal number as the number of applications. For e.g. For 4 applicants there should be 4 copies of the sponsorship
                                                                            letter & other docs.
- Please keep two photocopies of the passport ready before you reach the counter.
- Please keep the exact amount of change for the visa fee & VFS logistic fee ready with you.
- Please mention the name of the applicant & the passport number behind the draft (1 draft per applicant).
- Please fill out the courier address & SMS request slip in order to avail of the mentioned services.
- A COPY of the all the documents should be attached in EACH application.
- Adhaar Card (along with a photocopy)
Note: If you are visiting more than one Schengen country, the transfer & accommodation details for all the countries should be mentioned & highlighted in the
                                                                        itinerary.
                                                                    
Please highlight the specifics appended below in addition to Name of applicant & Passport Number on all the mentioned documents. 
- Itinerary: Date of Departure & Arrival & Check in & Check-out dates at the hotel
- Insurance: Date of birth /Duration of cover/Amount of coverage
Click here for the photo specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ZsXt7Khg4aBRaiUymKsys/e03793090a6dcdef3b030da0b785c1dc/photo_specification_160226.pdf)
Malta Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2NlDwCoWtClNw12fnZSN2h/9eb6e47a6c87e73d00219d6355f2d7c7/Schengen-VISA-Application-latest-version-ENG.pdf)
Declaration of Proof Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5tJh5TEjz768DFAMSNAizd/0e00c1c28cb7bb072ecd2cd655f0fbe3/Declaration_of_Proof_Form_160226.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification
                                                                        while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further
                                                                        processing. Photo specification are given in the below link : 
Click here for the photo specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/UPo8B0SZYENmUVWXTJ6A4/946dbceef349c0a1ae870ec2315a3773/photo_160226.pdf) 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link (Harmonised-schengen-visa-application-form-eng.pdf)
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
APPLY UPTO 6 MONTHS IN ADVANCE!
Visa applications 6 months before the planned travel day.
Since we are experiencing a huge increase in applications we strongly recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure to enable us to process your application in time for
                                                                        your departure date.
QUERIES? 
Visa related queries must be addressed to VFS Global Services Pvt. Ltd. Queries submitted to the High Commission will not be answered. (Contact details for VFS available below.)
If VFS do not have the answer VFS will forward your query to the Embassy on a priority basis. 
PROCESSING TIME
You can follow the status of your application via the VFS ‘tracking option’. 
The High Commission is experiencing a huge increase in applications, and while we assure you of our best to process your visa application on time for your travel, the processing time
                                                                        may take 3 weeks. Furthermore, please note that the days are counted from the day the application reaches the High Commission, and not from the date it is submitted to VFS. Kindly
                                                                        allow an additional 3-6 days of transmission between VFS/High Commission and return to VFS. Kindly ensure that: (i) your application is complete, (ii) any amendments/correction must
                                                                        be counter-signed by applicant; (iii) missing supporting documents will obviously result in delays and extending the processing time.
If you have questions and cannot find the information on our website, you can contact VFS Global https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt).
VFS Helpline Details
E-mail ID:  infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com)
Your correspondence should include:
- Your Full Name
- Date of Birth
- Passport Number
- Telephone Number
Apply well in advance and ensure your application is complete.

Overview
Schengen visa has to be obtained from the embassy or consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application.
                                                                        In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the embassy or the consulate where you will be staying for the maximum number of days, or from the
                                                                        point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.

visa_types.name: Long Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
A long-stay “D” visa allows its holder to enter and stay in MALTA for more than 3 months. It can be issued for various reasons such as employment, study, academic research, participation
                                                            in cultural, scientific, religious events, family reunification.
Please be informed that you are requested to submit a copy of PAN Card and Citizenship Card along with your visa application. 
Important Information:- Please refer the below mentioned points as instructed by the High Commission of Malta: 
- Old passport is mandatory for all the nationalities
- Visa Application Form for minors (under 18) needs to be signed by both the parents and ID proof of the parents
- NOC letters from parents should be in original
- Passports where alterations of the bio page or the validity of the passport is handwritten are not acceptable.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen Visa
Schengen visa has to be obtained from the embassy or consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application.
                                                                        In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the embassy or the consulate where you will be staying for the maximum number of days, or from the
                                                                        point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Schengen Visa
Schengen visa has to be obtained from the embassy or consulate of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application.
                                                                        In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the embassy or the consulate where you will be staying for the maximum number of days, or from the
                                                                        point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Tourist]
The applicable VISA Fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by Demand Draft in Indian Rupees (INR). Demand Draft should be drawn in favor of "High Commission of the Republic of Malta",
                                                                            and be payable at New Delhi. It is subject to change every month end. Kindly also note that the Demand Draft to pay visa fee must be made at the NIBL (Nepal Investment Bank Ltd)
                                                                            bank counter located inside Visa Application Center.
- There is a bank charge of NPR 1375 to prepare the Demand draft.
- Applicant shall be levied a Service charge (inclusive of VAT) of NPR 8894 /- (50 Euros).
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.

## Documents Required
Visit to Family & Friends (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4uqCC3wofvBOhhMNU88aqf/79327fd6fcc5e144464c854b2fc18e39/Family-and-Friends-_New-Delhi_-Checklists-Version-2.pdf) 
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. 
Your passport must not be older than 10 years also it  must be valid for at least THREE MONTHS longer than the intended stay. Your  passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix the visa. 
- The Visa application form must be complete & duly signed by the applicant. (Both the parents must sign in case of minor applicants).
- Please ensure that you have photocopies of all your documents in equal number as the number of applications. For e.g. For 4 applicants there should be 4 copies of the sponsorship
                                                                            letter & other docs.
- Please keep two photocopies of the passport ready before you reach the counter.
- Please keep the exact amount of change for the visa fee & VFS logistic fee ready with you.
- Please mention the name of the applicant & the passport number behind the draft (1 draft per applicant).
- Please fill out the courier address & SMS request slip in order to avail of the mentioned services.
- A COPY of the all the documents should be attached in EACH application.
- Adhaar card (along with a photocopy)
Note: If you are visiting more than one Schengen country, the transfer & accommodation details for all the countries should be mentioned & highlighted in the
                                                                        itinerary.
                                                                    
Please highlight the specifics appended below in addition to Name of applicant & Passport Number on all the mentioned documents. 
- Itinerary: Date of Departure & Arrival & Check in & Check-out dates at the hotel
- Insurance: Date of birth /Duration of cover/Amount of coverage

## Photo Specifications
Applicants Photograph will be captured at the VFs center as a part of his biometrics process. However applicants are instructed to carry one photograph along with them as per specification
                                                                        while they submit their application.
Children below the age of 1year need not be present in the Vac for biometrics process. However two photograph of the child needs to be submitted along with the application for further
                                                                        processing. Photo specification are given in the below link : 
Click here for the photo specification (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/UPo8B0SZYENmUVWXTJ6A4/946dbceef349c0a1ae870ec2315a3773/photo_160226.pdf) 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link (Harmonised-schengen-visa-application-form-eng.pdf)
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
APPLY UPTO 6 MONTHS IN ADVANCE!
Visa applications 6 months before the planned travel day.
Since we are experiencing a huge increase in applications we strongly recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure to enable us to process your application in time for
                                                                        your departure date.
QUERIES? 
Visa related queries must be addressed to VFS Global Services Pvt. Ltd. Queries submitted to the High Commission will not be answered. (Contact details for VFS available below.)
If VFS do not have the answer VFS will forward your query to the Embassy on a priority basis. 
PROCESSING TIME
You can follow the status of your application via the VFS ‘tracking option’. 
The High Commission is experiencing a huge increase in applications, and while we assure you of our best to process your visa application on time for your travel, the processing time
                                                                        may take 3 weeks. Furthermore, please note that the days are counted from the day the application reaches the High Commission, and not from the date it is submitted to VFS. Kindly
                                                                        allow an additional 3-6 days of transmission between VFS/High Commission and return to VFS. Kindly ensure that: (i) your application is complete, (ii) any amendments/correction must
                                                                        be counter-signed by applicant; (iii) missing supporting documents will obviously result in delays and extending the processing time.
If you have questions and cannot find the information on our website, you can contact VFS Global https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt).
VFS Helpline Details
E-mail ID:  infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com)
Your correspondence should include:
- Your Full Name
- Date of Birth
- Passport Number
- Telephone Number
Apply well in advance and ensure your application is complete.

## Download Forms
Malta Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5apYefV8AmZmfY0HYhj73T/550e4bd2cf895097f9b90beb0ea1e2e3/visa-application-form__7_.pdf)

visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
The short-stay visa is the most common Schengen visa. It entitles travellers, subject to the visa requirement, to enter the territories of the 26 Schengen States to pay a continuous visit or several
                                                            visits (depending on the number of entries granted by the consulate), the duration of which does not exceed three months (90 days) in any half-year from the date of first entry in the Schengen
                                                            area. 
Applicants from Bangladesh are requested to submit their Short term Visa Application (C Type) with the Embassy of Italy in Dhaka.
You can apply for a visa minimum 15 days or maximum 3 months before your intended date of travel. Applicants are strongly advised not to confirm their travel arrangements until they have received
                                                            their visa. 
Please make a note of the below points before submitting your application at the Visa Application Centre:
- The applications should be submitted 15 days prior to the date of travel, except for applicants applying under Business category. For any exceptions you are requested to contact the High Commission
                                                                directly by writing an e-mail maltahighcommission.newdelhi@gov.mt (mailto:maltahighcommission.newdelhi@gov.mt)
- Photocopy of all pages of passports needs to be attached in application at the time of submission for all the categories
- Applicant needs to submit their old passports and if passport is lost (and not marked as lost on new passport) then police report (FIR) also is required.
- Applicants applying under Student visa need to submit the bank statements of last 06 months. Bank statements should be signed and stamped by bank, along with bank letter is mandatory.
Important Information:- Please refer the below mentioned points as instructed by Indian authorities, the High Commission of Malta:
- Old passport is mandatory for all the nationalities
- Visa Application Form for minors (under 18) needs to be signed by both the parents and ID proof of the parents
- NOC letters from parents should be in original
- Passports where alterations of the bio page or the validity of the passport is handwritten are not acceptable.
Increased Fees for Visa Applications
 Please Note: As of 11 June 2024 the Schengen visa fee per person (Short Stay Visa) will increase from 80 to 90 euros or the equivalent amount in your local currency. For children between 6 - 12 years old the visa fee will increase to 45 euros or equivalent.

                                                                            and be payable at New Delhi. It is subject to change every month end. Kindly also note that the Demand Draft to pay visa fee must be made at the NIBL (Nepal Investment Bank Ltd)
                                                                            bank counter located inside Visa Application Center.
- There is a bank charge of NPR 1375 to prepare the Demand draft.
- Applicant shall be levied a Service charge of NPR 7230 /- (50 Euros).
- The VISA Fee and VFS Service Fees are Non-Refundable in case the VISA is refused.

Your passport must not be older than 10 years also it must be valid for at least THREE MONTHS longer than the intended stay. Your passport must have at least TWO BLANK PAGES to affix
                                                                        the visa. 
- The Visa application form must be complete & duly signed by the applicant. (Both the parents must sign in case of minor applicants).
- Please ensure that you have photocopies of all your documents in equal number as the number of applications. For e.g. For 4 applicants there should be 4 copies of the sponsorship
                                                                            letter & other docs.
- Please keep two photocopies of the passport ready before you reach the counter.
- Please keep the exact amount of change for the visa fee & VFS logistic fee ready with you.
- Please mention the name of the applicant & the passport number behind the draft (1 draft per applicant).
- Please fill out the courier address & SMS request slip in order to avail of the mentioned services.
- A COPY of the all the documents should be attached in EACH application.
- Adhaar card (along with a photocopy)
Note: If you are visiting more than one Schengen country, the transfer & accommodation details for all the countries should be mentioned & highlighted in the
                                                                        itinerary. 
Please highlight the specifics appended below in addition to Name of applicant & Passport Number on all the mentioned documents. 
- Itinerary: Date of Departure & Arrival & Check in & Check-out dates at the hotel
- Insurance: Date of birth /Duration of cover/Amount of coverage

## Processing Time
APPLY UPTO 6 MONTHS IN ADVANCE!
Visa applications 6 months before the planned travel day.
Since we are experiencing a huge increase in applications we strongly recommend that you apply at least 4 weeks prior to departure to enable us to process your application in time for
                                                                        your departure date.
QUERIES? 
Visa related queries must be addressed to VFS Global Services Pvt. Ltd. Queries submitted to the High Commission will not be answered. (Contact details for VFS available below.)
If VFS do not have the answer VFS will forward your query to the Embassy on a priority basis. 
PROCESSING TIME
You can follow the status of your application via the VFS ‘tracking option’. 
The High Commission is experiencing a huge increase in applications, and while we assure you of our best to process your visa application on time for your travel, the processing time
                                                                        may take 3 weeks. Furthermore, please note that the days are counted from the day the application reaches the High Commission, and not from the date it is submitted to VFS. Kindly
                                                                        allow an additional 3-6 days of transmission between VFS/High Commission and return to VFS. Kindly ensure that: (i) your application is complete, (ii) any amendments/correction must
                                                                        be counter-signed by applicant; (iii) missing supporting documents will obviously result in delays and extending the processing time.
If you have questions and cannot find the information on our website, you can contact VFS Global https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/npl/en/mlt).
VFS Helpline Details
E-mail ID:  infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com (mailto:infomaltanp@vfshelpline.com)
Your correspondence should include:
- Your Full Name
- Date of Birth
- Passport Number
- Telephone Number
Apply well in advance and ensure your application is complete.
